name: Welcome to TRLMIXX Trails
description: TRLMIXX curates the best off-road trails, forest roads, and overland routes across the Western US. New trails are added regularly — check back often and turn on notifications to stay updated.
notes: Tap any trail to view full details, conditions, and directions. Tap 'Add to My Trails' to save a trail to your personal list. TRLMIXX trails are verified by the community — if conditions change, report it.
